name: Mailhouse Media - Scraper → GHL Contact Sync

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ email: $json.email, phone: $json.phone, firstName: $json.firstName, lastName: $json.lastName, businessName: $json.businessName, address1: $json.address1, city: $json.city, state: $json.state, postalCode: $json.postalCode, website: $json.website, tags: $json.tags, source: $json.source }) }}

meta.description: Receives scraped prospects and syncs them to GoHighLevel as contacts with tags for city, route, zip, and category. GHL then handles all outreach automation.
